articles.title: Jensen Huang says he’s found a ‘brand new’ $200B market for Nvidia
articles.summary: The next big thing for Nvidia will be CPUs for AI agents, $200 billion worth, CEO Jensen Huang predicts.

articles.title: Imperagen raises £5 million to use quantum physics, AI on enzyme engineering
articles.summary: Biotech company Imperagen announced on Thursday a £5 million ($6.7 million) seed round led by PXN Ventures, with participation from IQ Capital and Northern Gritstone.

articles.title: 合肥又赌赢了？合肥押注长鑫存储怎么又成了？
articles.summary: 纵览合肥这么多年的产业投资逻辑，虽然表面上看很多人觉得有一定的“赌性”在其中，但是大多数的投资都是在符合产业发展逻辑基础上的主动作为，也许这就是合肥作为有名风投之城能够有所作为的关键吧。

articles.title: The next phase of OpenAI’s Education for Countries
articles.summary: OpenAI advances Education for Countries, expanding AI adoption in schools with new partnerships, teacher training, and tools to improve global learning outcomes.

articles.title: How Ramp engineers accelerate code review with Codex
articles.summary: How Ramp engineers use Codex with GPT-5.5 to review code and ship improvements, allowing them to get substantive feedback in minutes instead of hours.
